modules.name: stac_fastapi.types.config
documentation: stac_fastapi.types.config module.

classes.name: stac_fastapi.types.config.ApiSettings
documentation:
ApiSettings.

Defines api configuration, potentially through environment variables.
See https://pydantic-docs.helpmanual.io/usage/settings/.
Attributes:
    environment: name of the environment (ex. dev/prod).
    debug: toggles debug mode.
    forbidden_fields: set of fields defined by STAC but not included in the database.
    indexed_fields:
        set of fields which are usually in `item.properties` but are indexed
        as distinct columns in the database.

classes.name: stac_fastapi.types.config.Settings

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.config.Settings.set
documentation: Set the global settings.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.config.Settings.get
documentation:
Get the settings.

If they have not yet been set, throws an exception.
Holds the global instance of settings.

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.datetime_to_str
documentation:
Converts a {class}`datetime.datetime` instance to an ISO8601 string in the
[RFC 3339, section 5.6](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339#section-5.6) format required by
the {stac-spec}`STAC Spec <master/item-spec/common-metadata.md#date-and-time>`.

Args:

: dt : The datetime to convert.
  timespec: An optional argument that specifies the number of additional

  > terms of the time to include. Valid options are 'auto', 'hours',
  > 'minutes', 'seconds', 'milliseconds' and 'microseconds'. The default value
  > is 'auto'.

Returns:

: str: The ISO8601 (RFC 3339) formatted string representing the datetime.
Borrowed from pystac - https://github.com/stac-utils/pystac/blob/f5e4cf4a29b62e9ef675d4a4dac7977b09f53c8f/pystac/utils.py#L370-L394

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.rfc3339_str_to_datetime
documentation:
Convert a string conforming to RFC 3339 to a {class}`datetime.datetime`.

Uses {meth}`iso8601.parse_date` under the hood.

Args:

: s (str) : The string to convert to {class}`datetime.datetime`.

Returns:

: str: The datetime represented by the ISO8601 (RFC 3339) formatted string.

Raises:

: ValueError: If the string is not a valid RFC 3339 string.

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.parse_single_date
documentation:
Parse a single RFC3339 date string into a datetime object.

Args:
    date_str (str): A string representing the date in RFC3339 format.

Returns:
    datetime: A datetime object parsed from the date_str.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the date_str is empty or contains the placeholder '..'.

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.str_to_interval
documentation:
Extract a single datetime object or a tuple of datetime objects from an
interval string defined by the OGC API. The interval can either be a
single datetime or a range with start and end datetime.

Args:
    interval (Optional[str]): The interval string to convert to datetime objects,
    or None if no datetime is specified.

Returns:
    Optional[DateTimeType]: A single datetime.datetime object, a tuple of
    datetime.datetime objects, or None if input is None.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the string is not valid for various reasons such as being empty,
    having more than one slash, or if date formats are invalid.

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.now_in_utc
documentation: Return a datetime value of now with the UTC timezone applied.

functions.name: stac_fastapi.types.rfc3339.now_to_rfc3339_str
documentation: Return an RFC 3339 string representing now.

modules.name: stac_fastapi.types.core
documentation: Base clients.

classes.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.create_item
documentation:
Create a new item.

Called with `POST /collections/{collection_id}/items`.

Args:
    item: the item or item collection
    collection_id: the id of the collection from the resource path

Returns:
    The item that was created or None if item collection.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.update_item
documentation:
Perform a complete update on an existing item.

Called with `PUT /collections/{collection_id}/items`. It is expected
that this item already exists.  The update should do a diff against the
saved item and perform any necessary updates.  Partial updates are not
supported by the transactions extension.

Args:
    item: the item (must be complete)
    collection_id: the id of the collection from the resource path

Returns:
    The updated item.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.delete_item
documentation:
Delete an item from a collection.

Called with `DELETE /collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}`

Args:
    item_id: id of the item.
    collection_id: id of the collection.

Returns:
    The deleted item.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.create_collection
documentation:
Create a new collection.

Called with `POST /collections`.

Args:
    collection: the collection

Returns:
    The collection that was created.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.update_collection
documentation:
Perform a complete update on an existing collection.

Called with `PUT /collections/{collection_id}`. It is expected that this
collection already exists.  The update should do a diff against the saved
collection and perform any necessary updates.  Partial updates are not
supported by the transactions extension.

Args:
    collection_id: id of the existing collection to be updated
    collection: the updated collection (must be complete)

Returns:
    The updated collection.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseTransactionsClient.delete_collection
documentation:
Delete a collection.

Called with `DELETE /collections/{collection_id}`

Args:
    collection_id: id of the collection.

Returns:
    The deleted collection.
Defines a pattern for implementing the STAC API Transaction Extension.

Called with `POST /search`.

Returns:

Called with `GET /search`.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseCoreClient.get_item
documentation:
Get item by id.

Called with `GET /collections/{collection_id}/items/{item_id}`.

Args:
    item_id: Id of the item.
    collection_id: Id of the collection.

Returns:
    Item.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseCoreClient.all_collections
documentation:
Get all available collections.

Called with `GET /collections`.

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseCoreClient.get_collection

Returns:

methods.name: stac_fastapi.types.core.BaseCoreClient.item_collection
documentation:
Get all items from a specific collection.

Called with `GET /collections/{collection_id}/items`

Args:
    collection_id: id of the collection.
    limit: number of items to return.
    token: pagination token.

Returns:
    An ItemCollection.

Defines a pattern for implementing STAC api core endpoints.

Attributes:
    extensions: list of registered api extensions.
